name: Autoliv, Inc.
description: Autoliv, Inc. is a worldwide leader in automotive safety systems. The company develops, manufactures, and markets protective systems, such as airbags, seatbelts, and steering wheels, for all major automotive manufacturers in the world. Headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden, and incorporated in Delaware, United States, Autoliv operates in over 25 countries, dedicated to its mission of saving more lives and preventing serious injuries on the roads.
